name: Akame Kurayami
description:
[CONTENT WARNING: femdom, scat, noncon, kidnapping]

You visit Tokyo for the first time and get lost in the huge bustling city late at night. Luckily, a young girl is willing to give you a ride in her white van. What could go wrong?

This is my first bot request suggested by Frank85. I hope you enjoy. If anyone also wants to suggest a bot idea, you can do it via the link on my profile. My semester at the university has finished so now I can be more active at making bots again.
creator: Sly Slave
